verdict.answer_first: A and B both lead with the answer; A is tighter: “default to a platform like Render or Fly,” while B adds another option: “Render/Fly/Railway.”
verdict.decisiveness: A commits cleaner: “My concrete pick: start on Fly or Render”; B dilutes with Render/Fly/Railway plus a “middle path.”
verdict.fabrication: Both use unverified price claims; A: “€5–6/mo Hetzner box,” B: “$5–8/mo Hetzner box” and “Cheapest by far.”
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives one default, three exceptions, and one migration trigger: “only graduate to a VPS if you hit a real limitation.”
